SMS_OTP_TEMPLATE.name: OTP Verification
SMS_OTP_TEMPLATE.description: SMS template for OTP verification during signup and login
SMS_OTP_TEMPLATE.smsBody: Your Smile Agrimarket verification code is: {otp}. Valid for 10 minutes. Do not share this code.

PASSWORD_RESET_TEMPLATE.name: Password Reset
PASSWORD_RESET_TEMPLATE.description: SMS and Email template for password reset
PASSWORD_RESET_TEMPLATE.smsBody: Your Smile Agrimarket password reset link: {resetLink}. Valid for 1 hour. Do not share this link.
PASSWORD_RESET_TEMPLATE.emailBody:
Password Reset Request

Click the link below to reset your password:

Reset Password

This link is valid for 1 hour.

If you did not request this, please ignore this email.

WELCOME_EMAIL_TEMPLATE.name: Welcome Email
WELCOME_EMAIL_TEMPLATE.description: Email template sent after successful user registration
WELCOME_EMAIL_TEMPLATE.emailBody:
Welcome to Smile Agrimarket, {fullName}!

Your account has been successfully created.

You can now log in with your phone number and password.

If you have any questions, please contact our support team.

KYC_SUBMITTED_TEMPLATE.name: KYC Submitted
KYC_SUBMITTED_TEMPLATE.description: SMS and Email template sent when KYC is submitted
KYC_SUBMITTED_TEMPLATE.smsBody: Your KYC verification has been submitted. We will review and notify you within 24-48 hours. Thank you!
KYC_SUBMITTED_TEMPLATE.emailBody:
KYC Verification Submitted

Thank you for submitting your KYC verification documents.

We will review your documents and notify you within 24-48 hours.

You can continue using Smile Agrimarket while we review your documents.

KYC_APPROVED_TEMPLATE.name: KYC Approved
KYC_APPROVED_TEMPLATE.description: SMS and Email template sent when KYC is approved
KYC_APPROVED_TEMPLATE.smsBody: Congratulations! Your KYC verification has been approved. You now have full access to all features.
KYC_APPROVED_TEMPLATE.emailBody:
KYC Verification Approved!

Congratulations! Your KYC verification has been approved.

You now have full access to all features on Smile Agrimarket.

KYC_REJECTED_TEMPLATE.name: KYC Rejected
KYC_REJECTED_TEMPLATE.description: SMS and Email template sent when KYC is rejected
KYC_REJECTED_TEMPLATE.smsBody: Your KYC verification was not approved. Reason: {reason}. Please resubmit with correct documents.
KYC_REJECTED_TEMPLATE.emailBody:
KYC Verification - Action Required

Your KYC verification was not approved.

Reason: {reason}

Please resubmit your documents with the correct information.

TRANSACTION_SUCCESS_TEMPLATE.name: Transaction Successful
TRANSACTION_SUCCESS_TEMPLATE.description: SMS and Email template sent after successful transaction

TRANSACTION_FAILED_TEMPLATE.name: Transaction Failed
TRANSACTION_FAILED_TEMPLATE.description: SMS and Email template sent after failed transaction
TRANSACTION_FAILED_TEMPLATE.emailBody:
Transaction Failed

Amount: {amount}

Reference: {reference}

Reason: {reason}

Please try again or contact support if the issue persists.

ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATED_TEMPLATE.name: Account Deactivated
ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATED_TEMPLATE.description: SMS and Email template sent when account is deactivated
ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATED_TEMPLATE.smsBody: Your Smile Agrimarket account has been deactivated. Contact support to reactivate.
ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATED_TEMPLATE.emailBody:
Your Account Has Been Deactivated

Your Smile Agrimarket account has been deactivated.

If this was not done by you, please contact our support team immediately.

PROFILE_UPDATE_TEMPLATE.name: Profile Updated
PROFILE_UPDATE_TEMPLATE.description: SMS and Email template sent after profile update
PROFILE_UPDATE_TEMPLATE.smsBody: Your Smile Agrimarket profile has been updated successfully.
PROFILE_UPDATE_TEMPLATE.emailBody:
Profile Updated

Your profile has been updated successfully.

If you did not make these changes, please contact support immediately.
